zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Dunbar於1386年出生在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾時，她的父親George Dunbar 11th Earl of Dunbar - Lieutenant of the castle of Cockburnspath, Berwickshire17歲，母親Beatrice Hay16歲。她於1433年之後與Sir Adam Johnstone Of that Ilk結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1434年之後在英國蘇格蘭，埋葬在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾迪萊頓。

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Dunbar was born in 1386, in Berwickshire, Scotland, her father, George Dunbar 11th Earl of Dunbar - Lieutenant of the castle of Cockburnspath, Berwickshire, was 17 and her mother, Beatrice Hay, was 16. She married Sir Adam Johnstone Of that Ilk after 1433. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died after 1434, in Scotland, United Kingdom, and was buried in Dirleton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Dunbar est née en 1386, à Berwickshire, Écosse, son père, George Dunbar 11th Earl of Dunbar - Lieutenant of the castle of Cockburnspath, Berwickshire, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Hay, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Adam Johnstone Of that Ilk après 1433. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée après 1434, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Dirleton, Haddingtonshire, Écosse.

de.Annandale, Scotland: Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Dunbar 1386 in Berwickshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater George Dunbar 11th Earl of Dunbar - Lieutenant of the castle of Cockburnspath, Berwickshire 17 und ihre Mutter Beatrice Hay 16. Sie hat nach 1433 Sir Adam Johnstone Of that Ilk geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1434 in Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Dirleton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Dunbar è nata il nel 1386 nel Berwickshire, Scotland, sua padre, George Dunbar 11th Earl of Dunbar - Lieutenant of the castle of Cockburnspath, Berwickshire, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Beatrice Hay, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Sir Adam Johnstone Of that Ilk dopo il 1433. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì dopo il 1434, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Dirleton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Dunbarが1386年にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父George Dunbar 11th Earl of Dunbar - Lieutenant of the castle of Cockburnspath, Berwickshireは17歳，母Beatrice Hayは16歳であった。1433年以後にSir Adam Johnstone Of that Ilkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1434年以後にイギリススコットランドで死去し，スコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアディルレトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Dunbar(이)가 1386년 스컷랜드 버윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 George Dunbar 11th Earl of Dunbar - Lieutenant of the castle of Cockburnspath, Berwickshire(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice Hay(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1433년 이후 Sir Adam Johnstone Of that Ilk(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1434년 이후 영국 스코틀랜드에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 디를레턴에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Adam Johnstone Of that Ilk após 1433. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu após 1434, em Escócia, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Dirleton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Dunbar родилась в 1386 г. в местности бирвиккшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени George Dunbar 11th Earl of Dunbar - Lieutenant of the castle of Cockburnspath, Berwickshire было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Hay, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Adam Johnstone Of that Ilk после 1433 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла после 1434 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности дирлетон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия.

Se casó con Sir Adam Johnstone Of that Ilk después de 1433. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió después de 1434, en Escocia, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Dirleton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.
